nasb.text: For thus says the Lord God, “The city which goes forth a thousand strong Will have a hundred left, And the one which goes forth a hundred strong Will have ten left to the house of Israel.”

esv.text: For thus says the Lord God: “The city that went out a thousand shall have a hundred left, and that which went out a hundred shall have ten left to the house of Israel.”

cnv.text: 因為主耶和華論以色列家這樣說： “這城派兵一千， 剩下的只有一百； 出兵一百， 只剩下十個。”

ccb.text: 因为主耶和华说： “以色列家的城邑中， 出兵一千的，只有百人生还； 出兵一百的，只有十人生还。”
